title: Release announcer (Playwright)
manager: Build the release announcer that posts new FSL versions to social (X and beyond) via browser automation — the decision here is to drive it with Playwright rather than pay for the platform API that broke and priced itself out. It's the outbound megaphone: every release turns into an automatic public announcement, no manual posting, no API bill.
cs: Playwright-driven headless posting per the fsl#1252 resolution (2026-07-04), replacing the dead X 1.1 API path; runs from CI after publish. This is the 'Playwright announcer' the v16 distribution umbrella (W12.10) references.
